description: Import the 'DataUtils' project from /home/ga/project-sources/DataUtils/ into Eclipse. Configure the Java Compiler preferences to treat 'Raw type reference' and 'Unused import' as Errors. Resolve all compiler warnings and errors in the project—including raw types, unused imports, missing serialVersionUID, deprecated API usage, and resource leaks—until the project builds cleanly with no remaining issues in the Problems view.
